title: From the Chairman of the Board of Trustees
content:
From the Chairman of the Board of Trustees

Dear students,

In the 2013-2014 academic year 4 faculties, 2 Schools, 2 vocational schools and 3 institutes and Educational Service which has been providing our university, “Yeşilköy 2001, education, health, Culture Foundation, on 18.06.2013 published in the official gazette, No. 6492 is a private higher education institution established by law.

Of our university, knowledge, questioning, researcher, successful communication skills, ethical principles and leadership qualities, the problems of the country and the needs of society and has sought to grow up as individuals see who can find the ideal solution. While doing all these things, Istanbul Esenyurt University, which you are a member of, will be your mentor to guide you.

Our university provides modern, scientific, high-quality and qualified education to its esteemed students with its teaching staff with superior knowledge and experience. In this direction, we aim to strengthen your personality, identity and professional career. I want you to know that we will not spare any sacrifice in achieving this goal. What we expect from you is that you will bring Istanbul Esenyurt University to the level it deserves on a national and international platform and ensure that it becomes a reference.

I wish the most sincere love and success to all our lecturers, students and graduates…

Orhan ÖZYURT

Chairman of the Board of Trustees

This content was updated on 01/07/2024.
